name: stockyard-embedcache
description: Embedding response caching for /v1/embeddings. Content-hash deduplication, per-input cache splitting, 7-day TTL. Slash embedding costs for RAG pipelines.

tools.name: embedcache_stats
tools.description: Get cache statistics: entries, hit rate, bytes saved, evictions.

tools.name: embedcache_lookup
tools.description: Check if a specific text has a cached embedding.

tools.name: embedcache_set_ttl
tools.description: Change cache TTL for new entries.

tools.name: embedcache_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the EmbedCache proxy is running and healthy.
